title: Energy Recovery Device Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: International ERD manufacturer establishing Saudi assembly with SWCC programme anchor
executive_summary: Energy Recovery Devices (ERDs) — pressure exchangers and turbines that capture the energy from high-pressure brine reject streams and transfer it back to the incoming seawater feed — reduce desalination energy consumption by 40–60%. Saudi Arabia's desalination fleet consumes 8–10 GW of electrical power; ERDs already installed on modern plants save $300–500 million in annual energy costs. All ERDs are manufactured by two companies: Energy Recovery Inc (USA) and Danfoss High Pressure Pumps (Denmark). Node DT-7 targets Saudi assembly of ERDs, beginning with pressure exchanger components (ceramic-lined rotors, end-caps, manifolds) that can be manufactured in Saudi Arabia using Ma'aden alumina ceramics (AM-2) and SABIC engineered polymers (AM-3). This creates a direct materials cascade: Saudi ceramics → Saudi ERD components → Saudi-assembled ERD → Saudi desalination plant energy savings.

companies.name: Energy Recovery Inc (ERI)
companies.rationale: ERI supplies 70% of global ERDs. Saudi assembly under ERI licence is commercially natural given Saudi Arabia's scale of ERI procurement.

companies.name: Danfoss High Pressure Pumps
companies.rationale: Danfoss produces iSave ERDs and has active Saudi Arabia desalination market relationships.

companies.name: Flowserve (Calder)
companies.rationale: Flowserve Calder produces Pelton wheel ERDs for large plants. Saudi component manufacturing.

companies.name: KSB
companies.rationale: KSB integrates ERDs into high-pressure pump systems. System integration capability complementing ERI device manufacturing.

companies.name: Suez Water Technologies
companies.rationale: Suez has energy recovery system integration with active Saudi Arabia water relationships.
companies.contact: Suez VP Water Technologies, Middle East

partners.name: SWCC
partners.current: ERI devices installed on modern plants; all imported
partners.upgrade: SWCC ERD localisation programme; Saudi-assembled ERD technical qualification; SWCC procurement commitment for Saudi ERDs

partners.name: Ma'aden Technical Ceramics (AM-2 connection)
partners.upgrade: Ma'aden alumina ceramic rotor linings for ERD pressure exchangers; direct AM-2 to DT-7 materials cascade

partners.name: SABIC / Polymer Compounds (AM-3 connection)
partners.upgrade: SABIC polymer end-caps and manifolds for Saudi ERD assembly; direct AM-3 to DT-7 cascade

partners.name: KFUPM Mechanical Engineering
partners.current: Fluid mechanics; pressure vessel design; rotating machinery
partners.upgrade: ERD engineering programme; pressure exchanger design research; Saudi water equipment engineer pipeline
